provenance: best-snapshot of --track multi (oval+chicane+gp+combo round-robin), seed 42, 3000 episodes, gamma 0.99, epsilon decay 1500, warm-started from the physics-v1 universal weights (universal v3 for physics v2: fresh multi training laps at most 2-3 of the 4 tracks under the new physics; the warm migration is what keeps it fully universal)
